provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female junior officer in her late 20s with dark hair in a regulation bun and the stiff posture of someone trying too hard, wearing a new-looking steel-blue uniform jacket with a single rank tab at the collar, the jacket still has sharp creases from the packaging, regulation trousers and polished black shoes, she carries a data tablet like a shield, everything about her is regulation-perfect which makes her stand out as inexperienced
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Junior officer in steel-blue uniform, data tablet, ship command area. The newness of the uniform sells inexperience. Good rank contrast.
